name: palhead
description: Palworld database & tools — static multi-page site (paldb.cc data)

scripts.build: node scripts/data-import.js && node scripts/style-import.js && node scripts/data-normalize.js && node build.js && node scripts/prepare-dist.js
scripts.build:html: node scripts/data-normalize.js && node build.js && node scripts/prepare-dist.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name palhead --branch master
